Log.LocationDesc: "BEAT INFO EAST ST 91 JSO TO KENWOOD"

details.IncidentDetail: "[1] THIS IS A SIGALERT TRAFFIC BULLETIN. THE ANAHEIM POLICE DEPARTMENT REPORTS THAT ALL N/B and S/B LANES OF EAST FROM KENWOOD TO THE 91 FWY ARE CLOSED. THIS IS DUE TO DOWNED POWER LINES. MOTORISTS ARE ADVISED ALTERNATE ROUTES UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE."
